title: Acosta besseriana

Acosta besseriana is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is a member of the genus Acosta, which is a group of flowering plants. The classification of Acosta besseriana is further divided into different taxonomic ranks, including kingdom, phylum, class, order, family, genus, and species.
uses: Acosta besseriana is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in South America, for its medicinal properties. The plant has been employed to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems.
